features: Great oven cleaner for domestic ovens, barbecue racks, oven racks, baking trays.
Elbow grease oven cleaner kit is straightforward and easy to use, no scrubbing required but you will be amazed by the results that leaves your oven sparkling clean.
Pack contains 1X Elbow grease oven cleaning kit and 1X Elbow grease scrubbing pad.

Follow the instruction carefully and with hand gloves worn, simply apply solution to your oven. Also place racks and trays in the bag, pour in the solution and leave overnight for a fantastic result. You will certainly be surprised by how cleaner solution cuts through the grease and grime on your oven and rack.

Elbow Grease Multipurpose Scrubbing Pads: Dual sided cleaning pads suitable for use on ovens, bathroom, dishes, microwave, floors, toilet showers etc. Soft side (non-scratch) is perfect for delicate surfaces and abrasive. side is ideal for removing stubborn stains from surfaces
